title: Toward the Vast World...
overview: Years ago, a tragic accident led to Kurau's possession by a Rynax. Now an adult, the Rynax powers she acquired so long ago have made her an unstoppable agent.

title: A Good Word
overview: Kurau's latest case forces her to protect a detestable young bridegroom.

title: Manhunters
overview: Kurau takes on an extremely dangerous assignment, rescuing a space pilot whose spaceship has gone out of control. There are complications, however. Kurau and Christmas are being watched by the GPO, the police department of the future, and a blonde man, who apparently is a private agent.

title: Passing Through the Night
overview: Kurau and Christmas are on the run from the GPO and must leave their old life behind. Kurau gets a job as an agent with a new company, going after a gang of art thieves. When Kurau's new partner is captured, she is forced to rescue him.

title: Lost Child
overview:
Kurau convalesces from her injuries incurred in her previous case. Christmas takes care of her, doing the cooking and the shopping.

Meanwhile, Kurau's father, is forced to use his scientific knowledge of Rynax energy to help the GPO. The GPO hunts a stray Rynax, while Doug hunts for any signs of Kurau, since she vanished from his surveillance.

title: Shining Rain
overview: The GPO sets a trap to capture Kurau. Doug, the blonde agent, befriends Christmas and Kurau.

title: A New Way of Life
overview: Christmas and Kurau flee to a seaside town, with the help of Doug, where they get jobs working in a restaurant.

title: Another Christmas
overview: Kurau gets volunteered to be a POD pilot in the local games. We find out why Ayaka hates the holiday of Christmas.

title: The Town Where the Angels Disappeared
overview: Using false identities, Christmas and Kurau flee to Los Angeles. They discover a Rynax energy plant nearby and Kurau decides to investigate. However the GPO has managed to follow them to LA, and the pair find themselves cornered by the GPO.

title: Sleeping Beauty
overview: Kurau and Christmas are captured by the GPO

title: The Voice That Calls You
overview: The GPO sets a trap for Kurau, when Kurau travels to the moon to rescue Christmas.

title: I'm Here Now
overview: Ayaka interviews Doug to find out the location of Kurau and Christmas. Meanwhile, Kurau tries to heal people who have been injured by Rynax energy.

title: Something I Must Protect
overview: Kurau and Christmas escape from the moon on a spaceship piloted by Kurau's friend, Jose. However, the ship is boarded by space pirates.

title: Yesterday Today Tomorrow
overview: Kurau and Christmas find a safe haven, living with their uncle, Frank and their aunt, Kleine, in Switzerland.

title: Anxiety of the Swallowtail Butterfly
overview: A Rynax boy finds Christmas and tries to maker her his pair.

title: The Gravestones On the Hill
overview: A girl named, Jessica, who has lost her family in a Rynax energy accident, rescues Yvon.

title: In the Mist
overview: Kurau rescues Yvon after the GPO captures Jessica. However, Ayaka and the GPO continue their hunt for Yvon.

title: The Visitor
overview: Inspector Wong tells Kurau and Ayaka about the GPO's secret agenda. Ayaka finds out who killed her family, when she was a child.

title: Each Path
overview: Ayaka visits Kurau and Christmas and shares some of her past with Kurau. Kurau and Christmas then travel to France to find two Rynax twins, to try to save them from being captured by the GPO. Ayaka confronts Director Saito.

title: Open the Window
overview: The Rynax twins, Windt and Regel, turn out to have no regard for human lives, when they act out their strategy to capture Kurau's Rynax energy.

title: The Frozen River
overview: Director Saito has perfected his newest crop of GPO soldiers. Kurau and Christmas continue to chase the Delyus twins. The twins, however, manage to separate Kurau and Christmas from each other, leaving them more vulnerable. But the pair are not in this fight alone. Ayaka Steiger has something special up her sleeve, to assist them in capturing the twins.

title: Shine in the Darkness
overview: The twins learn what it is to be human. What price will they pay for this unbearable knowledge?

title: The Light at the End
overview: Windt goes after Director Saito. Will Kurau, Ayaka and the GPO be able to stop him?

title: Before the Goodbye
overview: A lonely Christmas goes back to live with Uncle Frank and Aunt Kleine in Switzerland. Meanwhile, Kurau goes back to live with her father. We find out the real reason that Kurau loved the Christmas holiday.
